---
title: "Project 2 Dashboard"
format: 
  dashboard: 
    theme: flatly
    highlight-style: github
    mainfont: "Inter"
    orientation: columns
embed-resources: true
nav-buttons: [github]
github: https://github.com
logo: globe-1.png
logo-alt: "Blue globe logo"
---

# Research Question #1

```{r}
#Chunk used to load needed packages and data sets
#| message: false
#| warning: false

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(countrycode)
  library(glue)
  library(jsonlite)
  library(palmerpenguins)
  library(gt)
  library(tidyr)
  library(purrr)
  library(ggridges)
  library(stringr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(scales)
})

meta_data <- suppressMessages(read_csv("meta_data.csv", show_col_types = FALSE))
```

## Plots

### Tenure by Presidential Regime
::: {.card title = "Tenure by Presidential Regime"}

```{r}
#| message: false
#| fig-alt: "density ridge plot showing the distribution spread of tenure length in years by different presidential regimes."

tenure_data <- meta_data |>
  mutate(president_tenure = year - president_accesion_year,
    monarch_tenure = year - monarch_accession_year
  )

tenure_data |>
  filter(!is.na(president_tenure), 
         !is.na(regime_category),
         is_presidential == TRUE) |>
  mutate(regime_category = stringr::str_wrap(regime_category, width = 25)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = president_tenure,
             y = reorder(regime_category, president_tenure, FUN = median),
             fill = after_stat(x))) +
  geom_density_ridges_gradient(scale = 1.2,
                               rel_min_height = 0.01,
                               color = "white",
                               alpha = 0.9) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C") +
  labs(x = "Tenure (years)",
       y = "Regime",
       fill = "Years") +
  theme_bw()
```
:::

### Tenure by Monarchy
::: {.card title = "Tenure by Monarchy"}

```{r}
#| fig-alt: "jittered scatterplot that plots each monarchy regime by type of regime and how long the regime's tenure was in years."

tenure_data |>
  filter(!is.na(monarch_tenure), !is.na(regime_category), is_monarchy == TRUE) |>
  mutate(regime_category = stringr::str_wrap(regime_category, width = 25)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(regime_category, monarch_tenure),
             y = monarch_tenure,
             color = monarch_tenure)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.7, size = 2) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "C") +
  labs(x = "Regime",
       y = "Tenure (years)",
       color = "Years") +
  theme_bw()
```
:::


## Tables 
::: panel-tabset

### Tenure by Presidential Regime

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false

tenure_data <- meta_data |>
  mutate(president_tenure = year - president_accesion_year,
    monarch_tenure = year - monarch_accession_year
  )

# function to get the mean tenure of either presidents or monarchs, and group them by their regime       category
tenure_by_regime <- function(data, leader_type) {
  if (leader_type == "president") {
    data |>
      filter(!is.na(president_name), !is.na(president_tenure)) |> 
      group_by(president_name, regime_category) |> 
      summarize(tenure = max(president_tenure, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
      group_by(regime_category) |>
      summarize(mean_tenure = mean(tenure, na.rm = TRUE))
  } else {
    data |>
      filter(!is.na(monarch_name), !is.na(monarch_tenure)) |>
      group_by(monarch_name, regime_category) |>
      summarize(tenure = max(monarch_tenure, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |> 
      group_by(regime_category) |>
      summarize(mean_tenure = mean(tenure, na.rm = TRUE))
  }
}


president_summary <- tenure_by_regime(tenure_data, "president")
monarch_summary <- tenure_by_regime(tenure_data, "monarch")

president_table <- president_summary |>
  arrange(desc(mean_tenure)) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(title = "Mean Tenure by Presidential Regimes") |>
  cols_label(regime_category = "Regime Category",
             mean_tenure = "Mean Tenure (years)") |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(mean_tenure),
             decimals = 1) |>
  tab_style(style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
            locations = cells_column_labels(columns = everything())) |>
  tab_caption("Presidential regimes sorted in descending order by mean tenure length.") |>
  data_color(
    columns = mean_tenure,
    colors = scales::col_numeric(c("#deebf7", "#08519c"), domain = NULL)
  )
  

president_table
```


### Comparison of Tenure by Presidencies and Monarchies

```{r}
get_tenure <- function(x) {
  tenure_by_regime(tenure_data, x) |>
    mutate(leader_type = x)
}

combined_wide <- map_dfr(c("president", "monarch"), get_tenure)|>
  mutate(leader_type = recode(leader_type,
                              president = "President",
                              monarch = "Monarch")) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = leader_type,
              values_from = mean_tenure) |>
   drop_na(President, Monarch)


comparison_table <- combined_wide |>
  arrange(desc(President)) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(title = "Comparison of Mean Leader Tenure Across Regimes") |>
  cols_label(regime_category = "Regime Category",
             President = "President",
             Monarch = "Monarch") |>
  tab_spanner(label = "Mean Tenure (years)",
              columns = c(President, Monarch)) |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(President, Monarch),
             decimals = 1) |>
  tab_style(style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
            locations = cells_column_labels(columns = everything())) |>
  tab_caption("Comparison of mean presidential and monarchical tenure across regime categories.") |>
  data_color(columns = c(President, Monarch),
  colors = scales::col_numeric(c("#deebf7", "#08519c"), domain = NULL))

comparison_table
```


:::


# Research Question #2

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false

combined <- meta_data |>
  filter(!is.na(gdp_per_capita_nominal), regime_category != "NA") |>
  group_by(regime_category) |>
  mutate(regime_group = if_else(n() < 100, "Territories & Colonies",
                                 first(regime_category))) |>
  ungroup()
```

## Plots

### GDP per Capita by Regime Type
::: {.card title = "GDP per Capita by Regime Type"}

```{r}
#| label: fig-gdp-area
#| fig-alt: "Stacked area plot showing mean GDP per capita from 2000 to 2020 for seven regime types including democracies, dictatorships, and territories."

mean_gdp <- combined |>
  group_by(year, regime_group) |>
  summarize(mean_gdp = mean(gdp_per_capita_nominal, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop")

ggplot(data = mean_gdp,
       mapping = aes(x = year,
                     y = mean_gdp)) +
  geom_area(mapping = aes(fill = regime_group),
            alpha = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~regime_group) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  labs(x = "", y = "Mean GDP per Capita (USD)",
       subtitle = "Averaged across countries, 2000–2020",
       fill = "Types of Regime") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```
:::

### GDP per Capita: Democracies vs Non-Democracies
::: {.card title = "Mean GDP per Capita: Democracies vs Non-Democracies"}

```{r}
#| label: fig-gdp-line
#| fig-alt: "Line plot comparing mean GDP per capita between democracies and non-democracies from 2000 to 2020."

dem_gdp <- combined |>
  mutate(democracy = if_else(is_democracy == 1, "Democracy", "Non-Democracy")) |>
  group_by(year, democracy) |>
  summarize(mean_gdp = mean(gdp_per_capita_nominal, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop")


ggplot(dem_gdp, aes(x = year, y = mean_gdp, color = democracy)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Mean GDP per Capita (USD)",
       subtitle = "2000–2020",
       color = "") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
```
:::


## Tables 
::: panel-tabset

### GDP per Capita by Regime Type

```{r}
#| label: tbl-gdp-regime
combined |>
  group_by(regime_group) |>
  summarize(
    mean_gdp = mean(gdp_per_capita_nominal, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_gdp = median(gdp_per_capita_nominal, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n()
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(mean_gdp)) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(title = "GDP per Capita by Regime Type") |>
  cols_label(regime_group = "Regime Type",
             mean_gdp = "Mean",
             median_gdp = "Median",
             n = "Observations") |>
  tab_spanner(label = "GDP per Capita (USD)",
              columns = c(mean_gdp, median_gdp)) |>
  fmt_currency(columns = c(mean_gdp, median_gdp),
               currency = "USD", decimals = 2) |>
  fmt_number(columns = n, decimals = 0) |>
  tab_style(style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
            locations = cells_column_labels()) |>
  data_color(columns = c(mean_gdp, median_gdp),
             palette = c("#deebf7", "#08519c")) |>
  tab_caption("GDP per capita sorted in descending mean GDP by regime type")
```


### Mean GDP per Capita: Democracies vs Non-Democracies

```{r}
#| label: tbl-gdp-democracy
dem_gdp |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = democracy, values_from = mean_gdp) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(title = "Mean GDP per Capita: Democracies vs Non-Democracies") |>
  fmt_currency(columns = c(Democracy, `Non-Democracy`), decimals = 0) |>
  tab_style(style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
            locations = cells_column_labels()) |>
  tab_caption("Mean GDP per capita compared by democracy status, 2000–2020.")
```


:::
